name: Gorilla Frys
text: Stop! What are you doing here kid? Don't you know this is a dangerous place!

name: Player
text: Oh, hey. I am just here to learn about pythons.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Smirks* Tell me, son. Why do you want to learn about it?

name: Player
text: Because.... Because my crush said she likes pythons so I wanted to learn about them to impress her.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Hmmm.... a noble pursuit indeed.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: But don't worry kid! I will be your mentor!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: I, the GREATEST survival instructor of all time hereby make you my student! *Laughs proudly*

name: Player
text: Um... who are you again?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *stare for a moment then laughs* I am Gorilla Frys, the greatest survival instructor of all time!

name: Player
text: That's so cool!

name: Player
text: Shall we start? I can't wait for it!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: I like your enthusiasm. First, do you have your laptop?

name: Player
text: Um.... yeah, but.. why that?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: That's the important tool, you'll need them!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Thirty years ago, a programmer forged the greatest weapon ever created....

name: Gorilla Frys
text: ...Python!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Unfortunately... he also awakened the Python of Terminal.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: The creator managed to defeat it and banished it to the mountain over there.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Those who seek to understand and conquer this language, must defeat the Python of terminal

name: Player
text: That's a lame name, though.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *clears throat* Anyway I will help you defeat the monster,

name: Gorilla Frys
text: With the greatest survival instructor on your side, you conquer it easily *Smirks*. What do you say?

name: Player
text: I am out.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *stares* what? YOU TOLD ME YOU WANT TO LEARN PYTHON! What do you mean no?!

name: Player
text: Man, I wanted to learn about real pythons! The slithery things!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Oh those *nods*

name: Player
text: Alright, good day. Bye.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: WAIT!

name: Player
text: What?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: ....You get paid

name: Player
text: *Turns back* Really?

name: Gorilla Frys
text: If you conquer the python of terminal. *smirks*

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Your crush may reject you... but money doesn't *winks*

name: Player
text: You're right.... Alright, tell me what to do.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Laughs* That's more like it!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Now.... your first task. I lost my cyber knife somewhere around here

name: Gorilla Frys
text: It will be helpful to take on the enemies on our path

name: Player
text: ENEMIES?! I thought learning Python was just... typing!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *chuckles* Well usually? yes..

name: Gorilla Frys
text: But where's the fun in staring at tutorials and wrestling with bugs all day?

name: Player
text: Nah, I am out... It's so hard

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Well, it's easier than confessing to your crush...

name: Player
text: You're right.

name: Gorilla Frys
text: *Laughes* Don't be sad kid, this is going to be worth it!

name: Gorilla Frys
text: Now, do the usual fetch quest. Find my knife!

name: Player
text: Aye! Aye! Captain!
